en: If I was a girl in a book, this would all be so easy.
ko: 만약 내가 책 속의 소녀라면, 이 모든 게 너무 쉬울 거야.

en: Just give up the world happily.
Laurie's returning, you know. Oh, he is? Mm.
There's a letter from Amy. She's coming home.
Aunt Marge is very ill, so Laurie will accompany them.
ko: 마르시아 이모가 매우 아프셔서 로리가 그들과 함께 갈 거야.

en: What is it? I don't know. I've always been quite content with my family.
Perhaps, um, perhaps I was too quick in turning him down.
ko: 아마도, 음, 내가 그를 거절한 게 너무 빨랐던 것 같아.
